query:
SELECT productName, importedBrandName, importedCategoryName, categoryId, COUNT(*) AS productCount
FROM products
WHERE productName LIKE 'Apple iPhone%'
  AND categoryId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY productName, importedBrandName, importedCategoryName, categoryId
ORDER BY productCount DESC, productName
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT productName, importedBrandName, importedCategoryName, categoryId, COUNT(*) AS productCount
FROM products
WHERE productName LIKE 'Apple iPhone%'
  AND categoryId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY productName, importedBrandName, importedCategoryName, categoryId
ORDER BY productCount DESC, productName
LIMIT 20;
